q: Do you like to wear shoes that are comfortable or good-looking?
examiner_note: Nói về sự ưu tiên. Sử dụng 'priority', 'balance', 'daily well-being', 'aesthetic appeal'.

band7.text: I try to find a balance, but comfort is definitely my priority. I spend a lot of time on my feet, so having shoes that provide good support and don't cause pain is essential for my daily well-being. Good-looking shoes are nice, but not if they hurt.
band7.note: Sử dụng từ nối và lý giải thực tế tốt (priority, support, well-being).

band8.text: While I appreciate aesthetic appeal, I never sacrifice comfort for style. I believe that footwear should primarily serve its functional purpose, which is to protect and support our feet. I tend to look for brands that successfully merge both elements, but if I have to choose, comfort always wins out.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (sacrifice, primarily, functional purpose, merge, wins out).

band9.text: I’m firmly of the opinion that comfort is non-negotiable. I find that poorly fitting shoes can negatively impact one’s entire day and even lead to long-term physical issues. Therefore, I meticulously select footwear that offers superior ergonomic support, even if it means compromising slightly on the latest fashion trends.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (non-negotiable, meticulously, ergonomic, compromising).

v.example: Quality is non-negotiable for our products.
The chair has an ergonomic design.
The building has a great aesthetic appeal.

similar_questions: Do you think shoes are more important than clothes?
What do you think of high heels?
